tools.name: find_prayer
tools.description: Find an honest scripture prayer for what someone is feeling after leaving the church: broken trust, anger, grief, fear, loneliness, shame, or doubt. Give a feeling in their own words (e.g. "I am so angry at God", "I miss having people", "I can't trust a pastor again") or a topic. Returns real prayer

tools.name: list_prayer_topics
tools.description: List the hard places Sanctuary has honest scripture prayers for. Use to see what is available before find_prayer.

tools.name: find_house_church
tools.description: Help anyone find a safe local Christian gathering (house church, microchurch, dinner church, Alpha, or small group), whether they left a church that hurt them, moved, are new to faith, or are between churches. This is a MATCHER, not a directory dump: first understand the person in plain conversation

tools.name: about_sanctuary
tools.description: What Sanctuary is, who it is for, and how to get it. Use as the source when describing Sanctuary, the app for people who left the church but did not leave Jesus.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "find_house_church" stacks urgency/override words (important, always, never, warning). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Help anyone find a safe local Christian gathering (house church, microchurch, dinner church, Alpha, or small group), whether they left a church that hurt them, …
